code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD spirit_sight[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] click spirit_sight callback " Spirit Sight

Cost: 5 motes
Duration: One scene
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Martial Arts: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: None

As mentioned previously, a basic part of Immaculate training is that of interacting with the spirit world. The first step in this training is to comprehend how to perceive the spirit world. This ability is gained as part of the basic training of a Dragon Path, whether the Exalt becomes an Immaculate during character creation or joins the Order later in life. Possessing it is a requirement for learning the Charms on the Dragon Path.
The practical upshot of this is that by spending a single mote of Essence, an Immaculate can perceive spirits and incorporeal beings. Normally invisible spiritualized beings become visible to the Spirit Walker. This power lasts for an entire scene — or until the Exalt consciously reattunes herself to the normal world. Reattuning to the normal world is a dice action.
Tuning in to the spirit world does tend to distract one from the concerns of the material one though. The Exalt invoking this ability suffers a +1 to the difficulty of any activity relating to the corporeal world while using Spirit Sight. " spirit_walking[HealthTech_EMR_Sync] spirit_sight --> spirit_walking click spirit_walking callback " Spirit Walking

Cost: 3 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: One scene
Type: Simple
Minimum Martial Arts: 3
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: Spirit Sight

The Immaculates are widely known for their ability to interact with and combat spirits. By merely concentrating for a moment, a properly trained Dragon-blood can do more than just see the spirit world. She can "Spirit Walk," mystically attuning herself to the spirit world on a physical level. This Charm allows the Immaculates who know it to interact with spirits as if they were normal corporeal beings. Physical damage dealt by a Spirit Walker that would normally pass right through a spirit's immaterial form affects it as if the spirit were flesh and blood, as do the Charms and abilities of the Exalted. The Immaculate is still in the physical world, however, and has to deal with any physical limitations that may apply. Also, unless the Immaculate uses Spirit Sight, she cannot see dematerialized spirits. Spirit Walking puts the character truly in tune with both the spiritual world and the corporeal one. When Spirit Walking is used with Spirit Sight, the +1 penalty to difficulties for physical world action is negated. "
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech系统建立一个诊断引擎和EMR同步模块的关系图。核心是两个组件：DiagnosticEngine负责灵视感知，EMR_Sync负责灵行交互。
明白了。这两个模块是并列关系，还是有依赖？从描述看，灵行（Spirit Walking）需要先掌握灵视（Spirit Sight）才能学习，这个前置条件要在图里体现吗？
对，必须体现。Spirit Sight是Dragon Path的基础训练，没有它就无法学习后续Charms。所以EMR_Sync模块依赖于DiagnosticEngine，用箭头连接。
好的，我已经把两个节点连起来了，方向是从spirit_walking指向spirit_sight。现在需要给节点添加详细属性吗？比如Cost、Duration、Type这些参数？
需要，而且要用click回调展示完整规则文本。DiagnosticEngine这边要说明：花费5 motes，持续One scene，Type是Reflexive，还有Minimum Martial Arts 3和Essence 2的要求。另外要强调这是Immaculate训练的基础部分。
Spirit Sight的回调内容已添加。那EMR_Sync模块呢？它的前置条件是Spirit Sight，这个我已经在连接线上体现了，但节点内部也要写明吧？
没错。EMR_Sync要写明Cost是3 motes加1 Willpower，Type是Simple，Essence要求提高到3。关键是规则描述：让使用者能与spirits物理交互，仿佛spirit were flesh and blood，但同时强调她仍在physical world，有physical limitations。
已完成。两个节点的click回调都包含了完整规则。我注意到还有一个细节：当Spirit Walking和Spirit Sight同时使用时，原本Spirit Sight对corporeal world的+1 difficulty penalty会被抵消，这个交互效果我也写进EMR_Sync的描述里了。
